positive: Minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial body (like a crescent moon or ringed planet) emerging from abstract, flowing nebula clouds. The primary subject should have a crisp, clean silhouette against a deep, gradient background of midnight blue, sapphire, and soft lavender. Incorporate subtle, glowing geometric patterns (like mandalas or constellation lines) radiating outward. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, cosmic dust gold, and brilliant cyan. Composition should be central, highly symmetrical, and suitable for repeating patterns on apparel. Flat illustration style with volumetric lighting and strong definition. Vector art quality, highly scalable, perfect for screen printing.
